mapper.delete: DELETE FROM yd_weather WHERE DATEDIFF(DAY, insertDate, GETDATE()) = 0
DELETE FROM yd_weather WHERE CONVERT(DATE, insertDate) = #{date}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO yd_weather (id, storeIdUuid, storeCode, storeName, realTime, province, city, weather, minTemp, maxTemp, wind, insertDate) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.storeIdUuid}, #{item.storeCode}, #{item.storename}, #{item.realTime}, #{item.province}, #{item.city}, #{item.weather}, #{item.minTemp}, #{item.maxTemp}, #{item.wind}, #{item.insertDate})
